query:
ALTER TABLE users 
  ADD COLUMN businessDescription TEXT AFTER passwordHash,
  ADD COLUMN businessIndustry VARCHAR(64) AFTER businessDescription,
  ADD COLUMN businessName VARCHAR(255) AFTER businessIndustry,
  ADD COLUMN preferredLanguage ENUM('es','en') DEFAULT 'es' AFTER businessName;
